ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton, C = Cherbourg) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number assigned by the company */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Class of the ticket (1 = First, 2 = Second, 3 = Third) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used to purchase the ticket (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "booking_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking agent who sold the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_booking_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_agent_id") REFERENCES booking_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the ship */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the ship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of ship (e.g., cruise, cargo) */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the ship was built */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the ship in meters */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the ship in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship used for the voyage */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Port of departure */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Port of arrival */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "voyage_type" TEXT /* Type of voyage (e.g., one-way, round-trip) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the voyage in nautical miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship the cabin is on */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage the passenger is on */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "deck_number" INTEGER /* Deck number of the cabin */,
  "cabin_category" TEXT /* Category of the cabin (e.g., interior, oceanview, balcony) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel group */,
  "primary_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary passenger in the group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of travel group (e.g., family, friends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_groups_primary_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel group */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger in the group */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the passenger to the primary passenger (e.g., spouse, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES travel_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service, marketing, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, IT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table accessed (e.g., passengers, tickets) */,
  "accessed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the booking agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the booking agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the booking agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., First Class, Second Class) */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deck_plans" (
  "deck_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck plan */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "deck_number" INTEGER /* Number of the deck */,
  "deck_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the deck (e.g., cabins, public areas) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_plans_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)
